rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI-level reference match (ref #56) with no in-text citation context, quote, or surrounding discussion. While the cited paper’s focus (supermarket price-war effects on supplier brands) is somewhat adjacent to FMCG sales modeling, the citing-note’s stated contribution and prior-work framing center on TV ad cue effectiveness, so there is not enough evidence to confidently classify this as clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
